description: A client needs you to set up their online artisan coffee shop on this WordPress site. The WooCommerce e-commerce plugin is installed but needs activation. Activate the plugin and configure the store currency to USD (United States Dollar). Create a product category named 'Artisan Coffee Blends' and add three published products to this category: 'Ethiopian Yirgacheffe' (Price: $18.99, SKU: ACB-ETH-001), 'Colombian Supremo' (Price: $15.49, SKU: ACB-COL-002), and 'Sumatra Mandheling' (Price: $16.99, SKU: ACB-SUM-003).
